title: ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brachystachys
intro: Ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brachystachys is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family, commonly known as starflower. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brachystachys is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
